Name: John
Subject: Accelerating Product Velocity at Supabase // Senior Product Engineer
Body:
Hi John,

I’ve been tracking Supabase.com's trajectory, and I am incredibly impressed by the engineering culture your team is building. Accelerating high-quality product velocity and driving measurable value at supabase.com is exactly the kind of technical hurdle I want to tackle.

Shipping complex B2B products requires replacing engineering assumptions with hard data. I’m currently exploring new Senior Product Engineer roles where I can own complex features end-to-end—from the database layer to the final pixel. 

I’ve attached my resume and would love to chat if you’re currently expanding the product engineering team.

Best,
Maurice Edohoeket
edohoeketio@gmail.com
https://folio-jet-mu.vercel.app/
